Thought 4: Abigail's alibi is directly contradicted by the evidence that she was the only one in the room with Jacqueline at the time of the murder. She also has the means (access to venom through her zoo work and seminar attendance) and potential opportunity (being present at the scene). Veronica, while having a motive (racial tensions) and access to snake venom (past work at a snake farm and research), was not present at the scene. The murder required direct application of venom, which aligns with Abigail's presence and expertise. Therefore, Abigail is the most likely murderer.
